title: Kyriefos' VanillaDeluxe
description: A deluxe version of vanilla, with extra building blocks, optimization, shaders, multiplayer mods and beancoins.
body:
This modpack aims to be a vanilla experience, but with some extra's. There are more building blocks, simple voice chat, shaders, optimization, more sounds and beancoins! There are also some QOL mods, like better recipes.

This modpack is mainly made for servers, but it's also playable in singleplayer.
